title: Jeongkyu Lee Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Jeongkyu Lee Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Jeongkyu Lee
Khoury Faculty
PhD in Computer Sciences, University of Texas
Silicon Valley Campus
While Jeongkyu Lee enjoyed aspects of his former role as a database administrator, he regretted that he didn’t get many opportunities to directly engage with students. Now teaching at Khoury College, he runs a student research lab that bridges his passions for research and fostering student success.
We started the research lab as a form of a student interest group. … I believe that such a research experience will be the foundation of their future
Jeongkyu Lee, Teaching Professor
Explore all Khoury Stories
